preferences.description: Any integration that calls an AI/LLM model
preferences.preferred_detail: Use your local AI gateway service rather than initializing provider SDKs directly. Callers authenticate with a Bearer token; all model calls route through your gateway.
avoid: raw API keys in application code
preferences.notes: Use the OpenAI-compatible endpoint — point the openai SDK at localhost

preferences.description: Multi-step automation, scheduled jobs, webhook triggers
preferences.preferred_detail: Use your local automation platform for multi-step workflows rather than writing custom scripts.
Use your local MCP server tools for social publishing rather than calling platform APIs directly.
avoid: direct platform API calls without the MCP layer
